drinks.name: Tequila Screwdriver
drinks.desc: Bright and easy — tequila lengthened with fresh orange.

drinks.name: Malibu
drinks.desc: Coconut and pineapple. A holiday in a glass.

drinks.name: Cosmopolitan
drinks.desc: Tart, pink and dressed up. Shaken cold, served straight up.

drinks.name: Somaek
drinks.desc: Soju and beer, the Korean way. Smooth and communal.

drinks.name: Long Island Iced Tea
drinks.desc: Looks like iced tea. Is not iced tea. Handle with care.

drinks.name: Mudslide
drinks.desc: Vodka, Kahlua and Baileys shaken cold with vanilla ice cream — a chocolate-rimmed dessert in a glass.

drinks.name: Café Latte
drinks.desc: A double shot pulled short under silky steamed milk.

drinks.name: Baileys Coffee
drinks.desc: Espresso and steamed milk with a warming pour of Baileys. Nightcap territory.

drinks.name: Matcha Latte
drinks.desc: Ceremonial matcha whisked smooth with steamed milk.

drinks.name: Smoothie
drinks.desc: Frozen fruit blended smooth with milk, yoghurt and vanilla ice cream.

drinks.name: Shirley Temple
drinks.desc: The original no-proof classic — fizzy, sweet, cherry on top.

drinks.name: Port Charlotte 10
drinks.note: Smoke, brine and barbecue char — big Islay peat.
